ddls:
CREATE TABLE "attack_types" (
  "attack_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each attack type (e.g., Attack_01_Bite) */,
  "weapon_category" TEXT /* The category of weapon that can perform this attack */,
  "ignore_invulnerable" INTEGER /* Whether the attack ignores invulnerable targets */,
  "no_reaction" INTEGER /* Whether the attack has no reaction on impact */,
  "is_ranged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attack is ranged */,
  "surface_impact_effect" TEXT /* Effect that occurs on surface impact */,
  "attack_type" TEXT /* Type of attack (e.g., Light, Heavy) */,
  "animation_id" TEXT /* Animation ID associated with this attack */,
  "attack_speed" REAL /* Speed of the attack */,
  "cooldown" REAL /* Cooldown duration after the attack */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attack_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "damage_attributes" (
  "damage_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for damage attributes */,
  "attack_id" TEXT /* Reference to the attack type associated with this damage */,
  "damage_type" TEXT /* Type of damage (e.g., Slash, Pierce) */,
  "affixes" TEXT /* Modifications or enhancements applied to damage */,
  "status_effect" TEXT /* Status effect applied to the target */,
  "effect_only_on_damage" INTEGER /* Whether the effect is applied only when damage is dealt */,
  "deflect_damage_id" TEXT /* ID for any damage deflection effect */,
  "critical_hit_chance" REAL /* Chance of critical hit */,
  "critical_hit_multiplier" REAL /* Multiplier for critical hit damage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("damage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_damage_attributes_attack_id FOREIGN KEY ("attack_id") REFERENCES attack_types ("attack_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "damage_coefficients" (
  "coef_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for damage coefficients */,
  "attack_id" TEXT /* Reference to the attack type this coefficient applies to */,
  "dmg_coef" REAL /* Base damage coefficient for normal attacks */,
  "dmg_coef_head" REAL /* Damage coefficient when hitting the head */,
  "dmg_coef_crit" REAL /* Damage coefficient for critical hits */,
  "dmg_coef_body" REAL /* Damage coefficient when hitting the body */,
  "dmg_coef_arm" REAL /* Damage coefficient when hitting the arm */,
  "dmg_coef_leg" REAL /* Damage coefficient when hitting the leg */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coef_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_damage_coefficients_attack_id FOREIGN KEY ("attack_id") REFERENCES attack_types ("attack_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impact_settings" (
  "impact_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for impact settings */,
  "attack_id" TEXT /* Reference to the attack type related to these settings */,
  "hit_stun" INTEGER /* Hit stun duration after being hit */,
  "block_hit_stun" INTEGER /* Hit stun duration when blocked */,
  "crit_hit_stun" INTEGER /* Hit stun duration for critical hits */,
  "impact_distance_x" REAL /* Impact distance on the X axis */,
  "impact_distance_y" REAL /* Impact distance on the Y axis */,
  "impact_distance_z" REAL /* Impact distance on the Z axis */,
  "camera_shake_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of camera shake effect */,
  "camera_shake_duration" REAL /* Duration of camera shake effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impact_settings_attack_id FOREIGN KEY ("attack_id") REFERENCES attack_types ("attack_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impact_decay" (
  "decay_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for impact decay settings */,
  "attack_id" TEXT /* Reference to the attack type related to these decay settings */,
  "impact_decay_rate" REAL /* Rate at which impact effects decay */,
  "crit_impact_distance_x" REAL /* Impact distance on the X axis for critical hits */,
  "critic_impact_decay_rate" REAL /* Decay rate of impacts on critical hits */,
  "min_impact_distance" REAL /* Minimum impact distance */,
  "max_impact_distance" REAL /* Maximum impact distance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impact_decay_attack_id FOREIGN KEY ("attack_id") REFERENCES attack_types ("attack_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "combat_modifiers" (
  "modifier_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for combat modifiers */,
  "attack_id" TEXT /* Reference to the attack type this modifier applies to */,
  "stagger_dmg_modifier" REAL /* Modifier for stagger damage */,
  "stagger_resist_modifier" REAL /* Modifier for stagger resistance */,
  "add_dmg" REAL /* Additional damage added by this modifier */,
  "impact_rating" REAL /* Rating of impact based on modifiers */,
  "block_rating" REAL /* Rating of block based on modifiers */,
  "parry_rating" REAL /* Rating of parry based on modifiers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modifier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_combat_modifiers_attack_id FOREIGN KEY ("attack_id") REFERENCES attack_types ("attack_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weapons" (
  "weapon_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the weapon */,
  "weapon_name" TEXT /* Name of the weapon */,
  "weapon_type" TEXT /* Type of the weapon (e.g., Sword, Axe, Bow) */,
  "attack_speed" REAL /* Speed of the attack with this weapon */,
  "range" REAL /* Range of the attack with this weapon */,
  "damage" REAL /* Damage dealt by this weapon */,
  "stamina_cost" REAL /* Stamina cost for using this weapon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weapon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "affixes" (
  "affix_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the affix */,
  "affix_name" TEXT /* Name of the affix */,
  "affix_type" TEXT /* Type of the affix (e.g., Fire, Ice, Poison) */,
  "damage_increase" REAL /* Increase in damage due to this affix */,
  "damage_reduction" REAL /* Reduction in damage due to this affix */,
  "critical_hit_chance" REAL /* Chance of critical hit due to this affix */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affix_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_effects" (
  "status_effect_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the status effect */,
  "status_effect_name" TEXT /* Name of the status effect */,
  "status_effect_type" TEXT /* Type of the status effect (e.g., Bleed, Burn, Freeze) */,
  "damage_over_time" REAL /* Damage dealt over time due to this status effect */,
  "healing_over_time" REAL /* Healing over time due to this status effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_effect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animations" (
  "animation_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the animation */,
  "animation_name" TEXT /* Name of the animation */,
  "animation_type" TEXT /* Type of the animation (e.g., Melee, Ranged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attack_animation" (
  "attack_id" TEXT /* Reference to the attack type */,
  "animation_id" TEXT /* Reference to the animation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attack_id", "animation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weapon_affix" (
  "weapon_id" TEXT /* Reference to the weapon */,
  "affix_id" TEXT /* Reference to the affix */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weapon_id", "affix_id")
)
